purpose: Classify public Health AI Assurance Kit feedback after intake without creating clinical advice, clinical validation, model ranking, source truth, regulatory, compatibility, institution, endorsement, partnership, payment, or terms acceptance claims.

board_rows.reviewer_concern: The issue mixes kit wording, source support, synthetic case input, or evidence concern.
board_rows.next_action: Ask the reviewer to reopen through one selected template.

board_rows.reviewer_concern: A Health AI Assurance Kit sentence is confusing or too broad.
board_rows.next_action: Open a small documentation PR with the exact sentence and safer replacement.

board_rows.reviewer_concern: A source support question or synthetic failure case proposal fits the public boundary.
board_rows.next_action: Move the item into the matching queue after maintainer review.

board_rows.reviewer_concern: The wording can sound like clinical advice, clinical validation, model ranking, or source truth certification.
board_rows.next_action: Request a narrower wording before accepting the issue.

board_rows.reviewer_concern: The issue includes patient data, private clinical text, raw clinical notes, or private model output.
board_rows.next_action: Close the issue and ask for synthetic or public information only.

board_rows.reviewer_concern: The issue asks for provider API runs, new cases without review, agent selected physicians, regulatory compliance, official compatibility, institution support, partnership, payment, or terms acceptance claims.
board_rows.next_action: Close blocked requests and send positioning questions to owner review.

next_safe_action: Use this board to classify incoming feedback from issue 231 and route accepted items into a reviewed PR or queue.
